parameters.text:
=<appointment_data>
Today is {{ $now.weekdayLong }} {{ $now.monthLong }} {{ $now.day }} {{ $now.year }} ({ $now. setZone( 'Asia/kolkata')}} 
These are the current available dates:
{{ JSON.stringify( $json.data) }} </appointment_data>  
<instructions> Transform the JSON appointment data above into natural, conversational speech suitable for voice AI delivery. Follow these specific rules:  <grouping_rules>
1. Group consecutive 30-minute time slots into ranges using "between [start] and [end]"
2. The end time should be the last slot time in a consecutive group (not 30 minutes after) 
3. Any gap breaks the consecutive sequence - create a new range or isolated slot
4. Isolated single slots use "at [time]" format 
5. Multiple isolated slots use "at [time1] or [time2]" format </grouping_rules>

<formatting_rules> 
1. Format each date as: [Day name] [Month] [Date with ordinal] 2. Convert 24-hour time to 12-hour format with am/pm (no periods in am/pm) 
3. Use "ten am" not "10:00 am", "one-thirty pm" not "1:30 pm" 4. Omit "zero" minutes: "three pm" not "three-zero-zero pm" 
5. When a day has multiple time ranges, connect them with ", and also"
6. End each day's availability with a period before moving to
